name: Q-11 R-10 prop_removed findings deduct from drift_hygiene per §26
command: printf '%s' '{"commit":"abc"}' > manifest.json && printf '{"kind":"prop_removed","component":"X","prop":"a"}\n{"kind":"prop_removed","component":"X","prop":"b"}\n' > drift.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-quality-scorecard.sh" --pr-sha abc --manifest manifest.json --adrs-csv 'ADR-1' --drift-findings drift.jsonl --invocations-count 1 --format json > out.json && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.components.drift_hygiene===15?0:1)' && echo deducted 1>&2
